::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Codex/GPT-5).
:::

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: asis
# Compact, findings-first convergence gate (#321). This partial deliberately
# reads the fit artefact itself so the badge is independently testable and fails
# closed when diagnostics_summary.json is absent or malformed.
import json as _gate_json
from pathlib import Path as _GatePath

from language_reading_predictors.statistical_models.reporting import (
    convergence_gate_badge_markdown,
)

_gate_path = _GatePath(".") / "diagnostics_summary.json"
try:
    with open(_gate_path) as _gate_fh:
        _gate_summary = _gate_json.load(_gate_fh)
except (FileNotFoundError, OSError, UnicodeDecodeError, _gate_json.JSONDecodeError):
    _gate_summary = None

print(convergence_gate_badge_markdown(_gate_summary))
```
